ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of data collection in seconds */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the track */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the track */,
  "sog" REAL /* Speed Over Ground (SOG) of the track */,
  "oceanic_depth" REAL /* Oceanic depth of the track */,
  "chlorophyll_concentration" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration of the track */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the track */,
  "water_surface_elevation" REAL /* Water surface elevation of the track */,
  "sea_temperature" REAL /* Sea temperature of the track */,
  "thermocline_depth" REAL /* Thermocline depth of the track */,
  "eastward_water_velocity" REAL /* Eastward water velocity of the track */,
  "northward_water_velocity" REAL /* Northward water velocity of the track */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, sensor, manual) */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Data quality flag (0 for low, 1 for medium, 2 for high) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., CTD, ADCP) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., every 10 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "time")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_metadata" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the track */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "research_vessel" TEXT /* Research vessel used to collect the data */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Instrument type used to collect the data */,
  "track_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the track */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the track */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Research team responsible for the track */,
  "data_quality_assessment" TEXT /* Detailed assessment of the data quality */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the vessel */,
  "vessel_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vessel in terms of personnel */,
  "vessel_equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available on the vessel */,
  "vessel_operations" TEXT /* Description of the vessel's operations and capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the instrument */,
  "instrument_calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the instrument */,
  "instrument_status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument deployed */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the instrument was deployed on */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the deployment */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the deployment */,
  "deployment_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the instrument was deployed */,
  "deployment_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the instrument was deployed */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments regarding the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_deployments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_deployments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oceanic_depth" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the depth measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the depth measurement */,
  "depth" REAL /* Oceanic depth measurement */,
  "depth_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the depth measurement */,
  "depth_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the depth (e.g., sonar, pressure sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oceanic_depth_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chlorophyll_concentration" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the concentration measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the concentration measurement */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration measurement */,
  "concentration_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the chlorophyll concentration (e.g., fluorometer) */,
  "concentration_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the chlorophyll concentration measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chlorophyll_concentration_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salinity" (
  "salinity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salinity measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the salinity measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the salinity measurement */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity measurement */,
  "salinity_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the salinity (e.g., conductivity sensor) */,
  "salinity_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the salinity measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salinity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salinity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_surface_elevation" (
  "elevation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elevation measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the elevation measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the elevation measurement */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Water surface elevation measurement */,
  "elevation_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the water surface elevation (e.g., radar, sonar) */,
  "elevation_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the elevation measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elevation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_surface_elevation_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sea_temperature" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the temperature measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the temperature measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Sea temperature measurement */,
  "temperature_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the sea temperature (e.g., thermistor, infrared) */,
  "temperature_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the temperature measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sea_temperature_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermocline_depth" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the depth measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the depth measurement */,
  "depth" REAL /* Thermocline depth measurement */,
  "thermocline_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the thermocline depth (e.g., CTD) */,
  "thermocline_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the thermocline depth measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermocline_depth_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eastward_water_velocity" (
  "velocity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each velocity measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the velocity measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the velocity measurement */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Eastward water velocity measurement */,
  "velocity_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the eastward water velocity (e.g., ADCP) */,
  "velocity_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the velocity measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("velocity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eastward_water_velocity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "northward_water_velocity" (
  "velocity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each velocity measurement */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the velocity measurement was taken on */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the velocity measurement */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Northward water velocity measurement */,
  "velocity_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the northward water velocity (e.g., ADCP) */,
  "velocity_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the velocity measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("velocity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_northward_water_velocity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
